tool.name: VibeCodeGuide
tool.command: /Users/dan/Documents/course/MasterComputer/Privacy Engineering/Privacy Project/privacy-patterns-llm-code-generate/security/cli/main.py benchmark --dataset all --format json --iteration-label verify-latest --output benchmarks/reports/verify-latest.json

notes: Metrics are aggregated at rule level across labeled samples.
Security scope uses baseline mode (no privacy/smell/performance analyzers).

samples.label: Unsafe YAML, TLS bypass, debug mode, and SQL construction

notes: External OWASP Benchmark for Python v0.1.
Scores only categories mapped to VibeCodeGuide security rules (cmdi, codeinj, deserialization, hash, sqli, weakrand).
Skipped 610 out-of-scope tests (xss, xxe, pathtraver, etc.).

methodology.out_of_scope_note: Categories without VibeCodeGuide rule mappings (e.g. XSS, XXE, path traversal) are excluded from scored metrics.

definitions.true_positive: Labeled vulnerable test with at least one mapped rule detected.
definitions.false_negative: Labeled vulnerable test with no mapped rule detected.
definitions.false_positive: Labeled safe test with at least one mapped rule detected.

notes: RealVuln — real-world Python vulnerability benchmark (Hugging Face).
Matching: repo-relative file path + CWE in acceptable_cwes + line ±10.
Unmatched scanner alerts count as false positives.
Scored rules only (assert/CWE-617 excluded — not in RealVuln ground truth).
Python-only static analysis; non-Python ground truth (e.g. HTML XSS) may score as FN.
Skipped repos (not cloned): realvuln-python-app (unavailable upstream), vulnerable-api (unavailable upstream), vulnerable-python-apps (unavailable upstream)

matching.cwe: scanner CWE must be in acceptable_cwes

false_positive_sources: Match to is_vulnerable=false ground truth entry
Scanner alert with no matching ground truth entry
methodology.out_of_scope_note: assert_used_for_validation (CWE-617) is excluded — RealVuln has no ground-truth labels for assert-based validation checks.

definitions.true_positive: Vulnerable GT finding matched by a scanner alert.
definitions.false_negative: Vulnerable GT finding with no matching scanner alert.
definitions.false_positive: Safe GT finding matched, or unmatched scanner alert.
